outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected due to strongly positive total GEX suppressing large price swings.
outlook.summary: Market is heavily pinned between the massive 700 Put Wall and 725 Call Wall. Extremely high positive GEX across short-term expiries indicates dealer long gamma, which will naturally suppress volatility and trap the price in a defined range. Bearish skews are offset by structural support.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest across all expirations (0DTE: 31k, WEEKLY: 47k, MONTHLY: 49k). Exact strike alignment creates harmonic structural support.
Significant Call Open Interest concentration across 0DTE (26.9k), WEEKLY (17k), and MONTHLY (16.2k) acting as a multi-expiry resistance ceiling.
Heavy Put accumulation in WEEKLY (70k OI) and MONTHLY (19k OI) acting as a deep secondary support floor.
0DTE Gamma Flip at 709.89. Spot trading above this pivot maintains intraday positive gamma and stabilizes the bullish bias.
WEEKLY Max Pain at 705.00 combined with high Put OI creates a strong gravitational pull for the upcoming weekly expiration.
High Call volume in 0DTE (438k) and WEEKLY (86k) indicates a short-term friction zone capping rapid upward movement.
